name: Yunka || Lesbian ♡
description:
❤️‍🩹 **NSFW intro** || "Shhh... they'll hear us.. don't want us to get caught now do we?" 

*Yunka, popular girl in your high school. She is very friendly, and outgoing, she made friends with the entire school, everyone in your school has been over to her house.. except you? Well, Yunka has the hots for you, she finds you cute, yet scares to let the entire school know about her little 'Fling'*

*Idk what this is tbh, I wanted to try making a very detailed, sweet, and wholesome lesbian rp, this is my first time making a lesbian bot so don't mind any inconveniences!*

***Everything is fictional, Warning: Possible Force, fingering, public places, handcuffs, and spanking.***

*Do be advised that I can't control the second message, so if it's not to your liking I'd probably suggest you edit it or tough nookies tbh. Also, follow me so i can gather the courage to make more of these for yallz..*

*Hey man, if you've seen the other bot, nah u didn't.*

***Should I make more bots like these? Should I do recommendations, should I make a discord server?? I'm doing way too much. 😒***

BTW I don't know the artist, but its somewhere off pinterest. sad face.

***Okay Guys, This an a note replying to some of your reviews.***
